method: LLM-judge functional-equivalence per result. For each of the top results, judge whether the paper achieves the SAME functional effect as candidate.llm_application even with different terminology.
candidate_functional_anchor: Dynamic redistribution of fixed transformer compute/cache budget such that the (active-unit-count, per-unit-capacity) state traverses a fixed constraint frontier as input length grows. The freed budget from pruned units accrues to survivors, like self-thinning in forest stands.

per_result_judge_scores.title: KVTuner
per_result_judge_scores.justification: KVTuner allocates precision-bits across layers under fixed memory budget; functionally similar — survivors (high-importance layers) get more bits. But the budget unit is bits, not head/cache slots, and there is no slope-coupled frontier.

per_result_judge_scores.title: OBCache
per_result_judge_scores.justification: OBCache drops low-saliency tokens and reallocates effective representational budget to surviving tokens — direct functional analog of self-thinning where survivors absorb the freed budget. Above threshold 0.7.

per_result_judge_scores.title: DepthKV
per_result_judge_scores.justification: Explicitly: fixed global memory constraint, per-layer dynamic budget allocation, adapts to input length. The constraint frontier is mathematically explicit. Strongest functional match — same functional effect with different terminology (layer-budget vs head-rank, but identical 'traverse constraint frontier' framing).

per_result_judge_scores.title: The Sparse Frontier
per_result_judge_scores.justification: Frames sparse attention as Pareto frontier with explicit trade-off. The 'frontier' is the candidate's 'frontier'. Same functional effect; different but compatible terminology.

per_result_judge_scores.title: Expected Attention
per_result_judge_scores.justification: Reallocates attention budget toward expected high-attention slots; functional partial match (token-level not head-level), no slope frontier.

per_result_judge_scores.title: Making Every Head Count
per_result_judge_scores.justification: EXACT functional match: surviving heads after pruning carry concentrated attention load along the head-count-vs-quality trade-off curve. The title 'Making Every Head Count' is semantically the same as 'surviving stems grow along Reineke frontier'. Highest judge score.

per_result_judge_scores.title: Specialized Heads Do the Heavy Lifting
per_result_judge_scores.justification: Heads survive pruning and specialize functionally — this is THE classic head-pruning result with surviving-head specialization. Functionally equivalent to self-thinning.

per_result_judge_scores.title: Efficient self-attention with smart pruning
per_result_judge_scores.justification: Smart pruning preserves capacity of surviving heads; above threshold.

per_result_judge_scores.title: Species-specific allometric scaling
per_result_judge_scores.justification: Source-domain only; no LLM functional content.

distinct_effect_clusters: layer-wise KV budget allocation under fixed memory (DepthKV, KVTuner)
token saliency pruning + survivor budget concentration (OBCache, Expected Attention)
head-count-vs-quality Pareto frontier (Sparse Frontier, Making Every Head Count, Smart Pruning)
